full_text:
Cheng Yuanzhi 程遠志
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Yuanzhi (程遠志). Served Yellow Scarves as a chieftain. Killed by Guan Yu. Cheng Yuanzhi is a fictional character. Cheng Yuanzhi was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Cheng Yuanzhi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
